rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount is unrelated to Elec. Code §259.003, which governs municipal regulation of political signs on private property. No conflict exists.
quote: A municipal charter provision or ordinance that regulates signs may not, for a sign that contains primarily a political message and that is located on private real property with the consent of the property owner:
_note: Rule text concerns political sign regulation; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
